content.situation: 游客在景点售票处第一次与售票员打招呼，想礼貌地寻求帮助
content.speakerText: Excuse me, could you help me with some information about tickets?
content.speakerTextCn: 不好意思，您能帮我了解一下票务信息吗？
content.responseTemplate: ___! What would you like to know?
content.hint: 这是对礼貌请求的常见积极回应，表达愿意帮忙

content.situation: 游客在排队时微笑着对售票员开启对话，希望获得指导
content.speakerText: Hi, I'm new here. Could you point me in the right direction for tickets?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我是第一次来，您能告诉我买票该去哪儿吗？
content.responseTemplate: ___! Just head to the counter over there.
content.hint: 这是对模糊请求的自然、友好的肯定回应，常用于服务场景
content.knowledgePoint: 友好确认与引导性回应

content.situation: 游客看到售票员空闲，微笑着上前开启对话，想了解门票选项
content.speakerText: Hello! I'd like to get tickets today — do you have any recommendations?
content.speakerTextCn: 您好！我想今天买票，您有什么推荐吗？
content.hint: 这是对开放式请求的积极、热情回应，常用于服务行业
content.knowledgePoint: 热情回应与开放性引导
